problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to it, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
